project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI dashboard, CLI, and MCP server
build_system: pip with setuptools, editable install via 'pip install -e .[dev,data]'
test_framework: pytest with class-based tests in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'pytest tests/ -v' - all tests should pass. 2. Run 'augur list-personas' to verify CLI. 3. Run 'augur analyze AAPL --pe 25 --roe 0.15' to verify analysis.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.11.14 installed.
contribution_requirements: snake_case variables, no forced formatting tools, keep consistent style with existing code, PR titles use fix:/feat:/docs: prefix. Metrics conventions: margins/ratios as decimals (0.46 = 46%), market_cap/fcf in billions USD, institutional_ownership as integer percentage.
key_patterns: Each persona is a BaseAgent subclass in src/augur/personas/ with an analyze(MarketContext) method returning AgentResponse. The registry auto-loads all 18 built-in personas plus YAML custom ones. DecisionCoordinator computes weighted consensus. Dashboard is FastAPI + Jinja2 with Bloomberg-style dark theme.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - core package (personas/, data, registry, api, cli, backtest, cron, mcp_server, soul, config). dashboard/ - FastAPI web app with templates/ and static/css/. tests/ - pytest tests. config/ - agents.yaml. personas/ - custom YAML personas.
